description_text: Specification: -Type: Car Rear Lip & Body Side Skirts -Color: Glossy Black look -Side Skirt Length: 35cm/13.8inch -Material: Polyurethane (ABS) -Position: Rear Lip Or Side Skirt Extension -Fitment Type: Direct Replacement Feature: -Universal modified rear lip and side skirt for car sedan. -100% brand new direct replacement as shown in the picture -Comes with 2PC Rear lip wrap angle splitters -Please measure your Rear lip wrap angle and make sure these splitters will fit -Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper -Use double side adhesive tape or drill holes and bolt on to your bumper (bolts are included) -Give your car a more aggressive racing look -New and nice qulity, durable to use. -Easy installation and easy to use. -A Perfect Aftermarket Replacement. Package: Pair Car Bumper Spoiler Rear Lip 1bag Bolts
